title: Codex Regius of the Poetic Edda

vellum.animal_note: Young cattle vellum typical for Icelandic manuscripts of this period; fine grain and moderate opacity consistent with calfskin.
vellum.region_note: Inferred from scribal hand, parchment preparation quality, and Icelandic transmission context.
vellum.age_consensus: Standard scholarly consensus (Árni Magnússon Institute; handrit.is)

preparation.finish: Well-prepared, relatively thin sheets for a large composite codex

ink.corrosion_risk: Monitor for ink bite on hair side

citations: Árni Magnússon Institute for Icelandic Studies
